en: Up. Now, get upstairs.
I am upstairs, dummy.
The third floor? Go.
It's scary up there. Don't be silly.
Fuller will be up in a little while.
I don't want to sleep with Fuller. You know about him.
ko: 난 풀러랑 자고 싶지 않아. 그에 대해 알잖아.

en: He wets the bed. He'll pee all over me.
ko: 그는 침대를 젖혀. 나한테 오줌 싸겠지.

en: I know it.
Fine. We'll put him somewhere else.
I'm sorry. It's too late.
Get upstairs.
Everyone in this family hates me.
Then maybe you should ask Santa for a new family.
I don't want a new family.
I don't want any family. Families suck.
Just stay up there. I don't want to see you again for the rest of the night.
ko: 그냥 거기 있어. 오늘 밤 다시는 너를 보고 싶지 않아.

en: I don't want to see you again for the rest of my whole life.
ko: 내 인생에서 다시는 너를 보고 싶지 않아.

en: And I don't want to see anybody else either.
I hope you don't mean that.
You'd feel pretty sad if you woke up tomorrow morning and you didn't have a family.
ko: 내일 아침에 일어났는데 가족이 없으면 많이 슬플 거야.

en: No, I wouldn't.
Then say it again. Maybe it'll happen.
ko: 그럼 다시 말해봐. 그러면 이루어질지도 몰라.

en: I hope I never see any jerks again.
ko: 다시는 그런 바보들을 보고 싶지 않아.

en: I hope I never see any jerks again.
ko: 다시는 그런 바보들을 보고 싶지 않아.
